esearchresult.querytranslation: (("vigabatrin"[Title/Abstract] OR "vigabatrin"[All Fields] OR "Sabril"[Title/Abstract] OR "Sabril"[All Fields] OR "gamma-vinyl GABA"[Title/Abstract] OR "gamma-vinyl GABA"[All Fields]) AND ("epilepsy"[Title/Abstract] OR "epileptic"[Title/Abstract] OR "seizure"[Title/Abstract] OR "seizures"[Title/Abstract] OR "infantile spasm"[Title/Abstract] OR "infantile spasms"[Title/Abstract] OR "lennox"[Title/Abstract] OR "dravet"[Title/Abstract] OR "status epilepticus"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("placebo"[Title/Abstract] OR "placebo-controlled"[Title/Abstract] OR "placebo-controlled"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("randomized"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomised"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomly"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomized controlled trial"[Publication Type] OR "random allocation"[MeSH Terms] OR "double-blind"[Title/Abstract] OR "double-blind"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR "controlled clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR "randomized controlled trial"[Publication Type] OR "clinical trial, phase ii"[Publication Type] OR "clinical trial, phase iii"[Publication Type] OR "phase 2"[Title/Abstract] OR "phase II"[Title/Abstract] OR "phase 3"[Title/Abstract] OR "phase III"[Title/Abstract] OR "trial"[Title/Abstract])) NOT ("review"[Publication Type] OR "meta-analysis"[Publication Type] OR "systematic review"[Publication Type])
